name: Land and Expand
summary: An account strategy focused on winning an initial use case, proving value quickly, and then expanding the footprint into adjacent teams, regions, or workflows.
whenToUseIt: Use land and expand when the full account opportunity is larger than the first winnable entry point and when evidence from the initial deployment can make later expansion more credible.
steps: Choose a first land that is winnable and meaningful enough to create proof.
Deliver value clearly enough that the first win becomes a reference point inside the account.
Expand deliberately into adjacent areas where the proof and stakeholder logic already support the next move.
example: A support operations team adopts the platform first, proves manager productivity gains, and then uses that result to justify rollout into customer success and a second region.
